case_title: OLIVIA JOHNSON VS. PHILIP MIRANDA et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING AUG-27-2007 AT 1:30PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: FLOYD L. BUTLER, CSR# 2518 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, OLIVIA AS TO DEFENDANT MIRANDA, PHILIP DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-13-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-09-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-28-2007
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-05-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-05-2007 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST OLIVIA JOHNSON, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-05-2007 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-20-2007. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MAUREEN HOWARD, CSR#7156. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-27-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-13-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
